items.title: Leasing Ops Incident Stabilization Sprint
items.description: A focused KTLO initiative to reduce critical production defects, tighten incident response loops, and remove the highest-severity reliability failures affecting Bike Mobility operations.

items.title: Fleet Workflow Debt Retirement
items.description: A KTLO initiative to reduce operational drag by refactoring brittle integrations, simplifying recovery paths, and removing legacy technical debt that slows change in Bike Mobility.

items.title: Bike Platform Patch Compliance Cycle
items.description: A KTLO initiative to keep the Bike Mobility stack within security patch SLAs by upgrading vulnerable dependencies, rotating outdated components, and closing remediation gaps.
